settings.title: Settings
aiConfig.title: AI Configuration
aiConfig.subtitle: Manage global preferences, system instructions, and third-party provider credentials.
aiConfig.toolPredictorDesc: Select a lightweight model to predict which tools are needed for each chat request. This reduces context size and improves response quality.
aiConfig.noRouterFound: No smart tool router models found
aiConfig.instructionsPlaceholder: You are a helpful AI assistant designed to assist developers...
aiConfig.instructionsHint: These instructions are injected into the context window for every new session. Individual agents may override this behavior.
aiConfig.providerSubtitle: Connect a new AI model provider to your workspace.
aiConfig.modelAvailabilitySubtitle: Fetch and whitelist models for this provider.
aiConfig.manualModelPlaceholder: Enter model ID manually (e.g., gpt-4-turbo, claude-3-sonnet)
aiConfig.validation.fillRequired: Please fill in Provider Name, Base URL, and API Key
aiConfig.validation.selectModel: Please select at least one model
aiConfig.confirmDeleteProvider: Are you sure you want to delete this provider?
aiConfig.confirmReset: Are you sure you want to reset all settings to defaults?
aiConfig.testConnection: Test API connection and fetch models
aiConfig.testConnectionNoUrl: API Base URL is required to test
memory.title: Memory System
memory.subtitle: Configure how Clara remembers and recalls information from your conversations
memory.enableDesc: Allow Clara to remember information from your conversations and use it in future chats
memory.privacyNotice: All memories are encrypted with your user-specific key. Not even ClaraVerse administrators can access your memories.
memory.clearFailed: Failed to clear all memories. Please try again.
privacy.title: Privacy
privacy.subtitle: Control how your data is stored and manage your privacy preferences.
privacy.chooseStorage: Choose how you'd like to store your conversations.
privacy.thisDeviceDesc: Your chats stay private on this device.
privacy.deviceWarning: Stored in browser. Others with device access can view. Clara has no access.
privacy.syncDevicesDesc: Access your chats from any device.
account.title: Account
account.subtitle: Manage your profile, preferences, export data, or delete your account.
account.privacyPolicyDesc: Learn how we handle your data and your rights under GDPR
account.exportDesc: Download all your data in JSON format. This includes:
account.exportNote: GDPR Article 20 - Right to Data Portability
account.exportEndpointError: Export endpoint not available. Please ensure the backend is running.
account.dangerWarning: This action is permanent and cannot be undone.
account.dangerDesc: Deleting your account will permanently remove:
account.deleteValidation: Please type "delete my account" to confirm
account.deleteFailed: Failed to delete account. Please try again.
settings.credentials.title: Integration Credentials
settings.credentials.desc: Securely manage API keys and webhooks for external integrations like Discord, Slack, GitHub, and more.
channels.telegram.name: Telegram
channels.telegram.desc: Connect your Telegram bot to chat with ClaraVerse AI directly from Telegram. Messages are processed through a secure webhook.
channels.telegram.botTokenHelp: Get your bot token from @BotFather on Telegram
billing.welcomeToTier: Welcome to {{tier}}! Your subscription is now active.
billing.paymentReceived: Payment received! Your subscription will be updated shortly.
billing.alreadyOnPlan: You are already on this plan
